user.title: HA-Copilot
user.description: Set up HA-Copilot — a deterministic capability layer for Home Assistant. No model, no API keys needed.

data_description.allow_write: Enables tools that create/modify automations, scenes, scripts, and config files (with automatic backup).
data_description.allow_restart: Enables the restart tool. Disabled by default for safety.

init.title: HA-Copilot Options
init.description: Adjust safety toggles for the capability layer.
